warheads.name: Boosted Fission Warhead
warheads.description: Estimated boosted fission device. Based on Dimona reactor plutonium production. 15-20 kt estimated.

warheads.name: Thermonuclear Warhead
warheads.description: Estimated thermonuclear warhead for Jericho III. Israel believed to have boosted and staged devices. Est. 1 Mt.

warheads.name: Nuclear Gravity Bomb
warheads.description: Estimated tactical/theater gravity bomb for aircraft delivery. Samson option regional targeting.

delivery_systems.name: Jericho III
delivery_systems.description: Israel's strategic ICBM. Three-stage solid fuel. Range covers Europe, Russia, Iran. Silo-based at Zechariah.

delivery_systems.name: Jericho II
delivery_systems.description: Upgraded medium-range ballistic missile. Road-mobile. Covers entire Middle East, Iran, SE Europe.

delivery_systems.name: F-16I Sufa
delivery_systems.description: Long-range strike F-16I variant. Extended fuel, conformal tanks. Nuclear gravity bomb delivery.

delivery_systems.name: F-15I Ra'am
delivery_systems.description: Long-range strike aircraft. Capable of reaching Iran with refueling. Nuclear gravity bomb delivery role.

delivery_systems.name: Popeye Turbo SLCM
delivery_systems.description: Estimated sea-based second-strike on Dolphin-class submarines. Nuclear-tipped cruise missile. Unconfirmed but assessed by experts.
